prompt: A 3D render of an indoor living room scene with objects like sofa, brown coffee table, TV on wall, lamp, and plants.

A comfortable grey fabric sofa sits against the far wall, with a rectangular brown wooden coffee table centered in front of it. A large flat-screen TV is mounted on the wall opposite the sofa. objects: comfortable grey fabric sofa against the far wall
